title: Upstairs / downstairs inscription interpretation
core_statement: I is the inscription station: the place where the just-lived transport is written into history.

roles.I: inscription station / stairwell between becoming and history

layer_grammar.before_I: upstairs motion: the event is still happening / becoming
layer_grammar.at_I: inscription: the event is written into registered history
layer_grammar.after_I: downstairs return: motion now carries trace/history

mode_1_cyclic_return.interpretation: direct cyclic return after inscription; like an elevator return from I to W

mode_2_sheet_flip_return.interpretation: sheet-flip stairwell return; after I, the trace returns through the prior seams as history-bearing structure

boundary: This is interpretive role grammar for projection modes.
It does not change the G60 source object.
It does not claim a physical time-reversal mechanism.
It does not replace the validation receipts.
keeper_lines: Return is not merely getting back to W; return means coming back after the path has been inscribed.
